name: pi-smart-router
description: Auto-model router middleware for the pi.dev coding agent

scripts.lint: eslint . --ext .ts && node --input-type=module -e "import { readFileSync } from 'node:fs'; import { parse } from 'yaml'; const doc = parse(readFileSync('config/models.yaml.example', 'utf8')); if (!Array.isArray(doc.models) || doc.models.length < 3) throw new Error('models.yaml.example must list at least one model per tier'); const tiers = new Set(doc.models.map((m) => m.tier)); for (const tier of ['zero-tier', 'economical-cloud', 'frontier-cloud']) { if (!tiers.has(tier)) throw new Error('missing tier: ' + tier); } console.log('models.yaml.example: valid');"
